item.title: Resource Roundup: Stop Drowning in CVEs & Prioritize Your Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
item.description: Discover the ultimate roundup of free resources on prioritizing third-party vulnerabilities. Stop drowning in CVEs and learn where to focus.

item.title: Top Concerns for Cybersecurity Leaders and Strategies to Build Resilience
item.description: Discover the top concerns keeping cybersecurity leaders up at night and strategies for building resilience against today’s emerging threats.

item.title: Software Updates Are Not Optional
item.description: It may be easier to push software updates to the next day, indefinitely, immediate updates are a small step in the right direction of a big impact.

item.title: Should Operational Security Be Discussed With the Board?
item.description: It is time to change our methods and report metrics to the board that are operational, yet, target-based and clearly tied to business goals.

item.title: How to prioritize security when executives are focused on business growth
item.description: Labeling risk takes a back seat to properly addressing the risk itself, let's explore the nuances of what third party risk really is.

item.title: What is the difference between VRM, TPRM, and Supply Chain Risk Management?
item.description: Labeling risk takes a back seat to properly addressing the risk itself, but while we’re here, let's explore the nuances of what third party risk really is.

item.title: CISO on the Road with Bob Maley
item.description: At each CISO Exec Net, CISOs from different companies meet up and discuss the most pressing and top-of-mind topics together.

item.title: Time to Revamp Your Typical Password Strategy
item.description: Common passwords makes it easy for threat actors to complete credential stuffing attacks – let’s make the job more difficult and take it up a notch.

item.title: Phishing: History, Statistics, and Prevention
item.description: Thousands of individuals are targeted every day with phishing attempts: what is it and what can you and your company do about it?

item.title: Don’t Let Chaos Bring You Down
item.description: During an economic downturn, bad guys are constantly looking for ways to attack during a distraction. How can you stay vigilant during noisy chaos?

item.title: How Are Threat Actors Leveraging AI Tools in Their Attacks?
item.description: As AI tools grow in popularity, it’s important to consider how threat actors use AI to launch cyber attacks.

item.title: What You Need To Know About the Different Types of Hackers
item.description: Learn all about different types of hackers populating the threat landscape, their unique methodologies, and what motivates them to take action.

item.title: Leveraging Black Kite for Compliance with OSFI’s TPRM Guidelines
item.description: How to leverage Black Kite when working to meet OSFI's TPRM guidelines.

item.title: What is Machine Learning and How Does Black Kite Use It?
item.description: Machine learning is revolutionizing industries like cybersecurity. Learn more about the technology and how Black Kite uses ML to detect third-party risk.

item.title: Know Your Risk: Social Engineering and Cybersecurity
item.description: Social engineering is a type of cyber risk that predates computers. Learn more about this type of risk and how to protect your organization.

item.title: Black Kite Named a Forbes Best Startup Employer
item.description: Black Kite is named one of Forbes Best Startup Employers for 2026 based on research on company reputation, employee satisfaction, and growth.

item.title: Focus Friday: FTPRM Insights on Critical Vulnerabilities in FreeScout, pac4j, MongoDB, Django, Langflow, RustFS, and Apache Superset
item.description: Expert TPRM analysis of critical vulnerabilities in FreeScout, pac4j, MongoDB, Django, Langflow, RustFS, and Apache Superset. Stay ahead of third-party risks with Black Kite.

item.title: Your Ransomware Fatigue Is Leaving the Back Door Open
item.description: Ransomware fatigue is real – but risky. Discover how third-party risks are leaving your organization exposed and what CISOs can do now.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights Into React2Shell and Mixpanel Data Exposure Risks
item.description: TPRM Insights Into Focus Friday: React2Shell and Mixpanel Data Exposure Risks from the Week of December 5, 2025.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights Into SonicWall SSL VPN, Grafana Enterprise SCIM, Apache SkyWalking Vulnerabilities, and Gainsight Client Incident
item.description: TPRM Insights Into Focus Friday: SonicWall SSL VPN, Grafana, Apache SkyWalking Vulnerabilities, and Gainsight Incident from the Week of November 28, 2025.

item.title: Rethink What's Possible in TPRM AI: Moving from Automation to Agents
item.description: Stop confusing TPRM automation with true AI. Discover how agentic systems unlock predictive analysis, foresight, and risk detection.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights Into FortiWeb, SolarWinds Serv-U, OAuth2 Proxy, pgAdmin, and W3 Total Cache Vulnerabilities
item.description: TPRM Insights Into FortiWeb, SolarWinds Serv-U, OAuth2 Proxy, pgAdmin, and W3 Total Cache Vulnerabilities from the Week of November 14, 2025.

item.title: Ransomware is Easy, And That's the Problem
item.description: Ransomware is booming as low-barrier RaaS fuels chaotic attacks and targets SMBs. Discover the new threat landscape and how to stay ahead in TPRM.

item.title: What’s Next in Ransomware: How Threat Actors Will Weaponize AI
item.description: Discover the three ways AI will accelerate supply chain attacks, from real-time mapping to self-evolving malware.

item.title: Is Your Vendors’ AI Putting You at Risk?
item.description: Your vendors are using AI, creating new risks faster than traditional TPRM can manage. Learn to adapt your vendor oversight with a new framework.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights on SharePoint, MSSQL, Kibana, Django, and Open WebUI
item.description: TPRM Insights on SharePoint, MSSQL, Kibana, Django, and Open WebUI Vulnerabilities from the Week of November 14, 2025.

item.title: Why Ransomware Groups are Zeroing in on SMBs
item.description: Ransomware attacks now target SMBs for maximum supply chain disruption. Learn new tactics and how to secure your organization from third-party risks.

item.title: Focus Friday: TPRM Insights on MOVEit, Redis, Control Web Panel, DNN Software, and XWiki Vulnerabilities
item.description: TPRM Insights on MOVEit, Redis, Control Web Panel, DNN Software, and XWiki vulnerabilities from the week of November 3, 2025.

item.title: Focus Friday: Critical Third-Party Risks In Mikrotik Routeros, Apache Tomcat, Hashicorp Vault, and Litespeed Plugin
item.description: Discover how Mikrotik RouterOS, Apache Tomcat, HashiCorp Vault, and LiteSpeed Plugin vulnerabilities impact third-party risk.

item.title: Now’s the Time for Agile, Data-Driven TPRM (and Our Latest Research Proves It)
item.description: Traditional TPRM fails against modern threats. New research reveals how to build an agile third-party risk management program for supply chain resilience.
